source: Derived from the real-bench anonymized BCM dump src/__tests__/fixtures/SAMPLE_BCM_SYNCED_2C3CDXL90MH582899.bin (VIN already anonymized to 2C3CDXL90MH582899). RFH SEC16 was extracted from the captured split records at 0x81A0 (BCM SEC16 = edbdff7cbbabc3a07d5a60763772fa86 = reverse(RFH SEC16)). See README.md for how the before/after pair is constructed.
